svg.aria-label: The platform circuit in its three operating states, stacked. In each the directional-valve spool is shown shifted to the active envelope. RAISE: spool shifted so the parallel envelope aligns, pump feeds A up through the counterbalance check to the cap, rod returns via B to tank. HOLD: spool centred, tandem centre loops the pump to tank, A and B blocked, counterbalance holds drop-tight. LOWER: spool shifted so the crossed envelope aligns, pump feeds B and the rod, a pilot opens the counterbalance, cap oil is metered out through the counterbalance and A to tank.

g.text: Spool shifts left/parallel: P→A up through the check to the cap; rod→B→T. ~100 bar.
Spool centred: pump→T (unloaded); A,B blocked; counterbalance holds drop-tight.
Spool shifts right/crossed: P→B→rod (+pilot→CBV); cap→CBV→A→T. ~10 bar pilot.
